case_title: ISIDORO CASTILLO VS. DANILO AMABEL MORAN

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT (CCP 673 AND 681.020; CC 954.5); ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, ISIDORO AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, DANILO AMABEL AN INDIVIDUAL DBA D A M CONSTRUCTION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, ISIDORO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORAN, DANILO AMABEL AN INDIVIDUAL DBA D A M CONSTRUCTION $8,338.91 PRINCIPAL, $108.86 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,627.77, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS RESTRAINING ORDER AND TURNOVER ORDER, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, ISIDORO HEARING SET FOR AUG-06-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, ISIDORO AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, DANILO AMABEL AN INDIVIDUAL DBA D A M CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DISCOVERY 610, ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS RESTRAINING ORDER AND TURNOVER ORDER, IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR, AT THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY.
